key_drivers: Iran War Oil Shock: US-Israeli strikes disrupted ~20% of global crude/gas supply, WTI surging to $103.19 (+13.5%)
Stagflation Risk: Oil shock driving inflation expectations higher while growth outlook deteriorates (GDPNow slowing)
Rising Real Yields & USD Strength: DXY at 99.28 (+0.30%), MOVE index at 81.26 (rising), compressing equity multiples
Risk-Off Selloff: VIX at 32.15 (+9%), Nikkei -5.2%, KOSPI -5.96%, global equities in sharp decline
BoJ Hawkish Divergence: BoJ on hiking path (April hike ~60% probability), supporting JPY structurally
